overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city plaza and intersection. The player walks through a white-tiled pedestrian area with palm trees and massive digital billboards, then descends to a busy street crossing with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians carrying umbrellas in an overcast, hazy atmosphere characteristic of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with digital signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered futuristic plaza with white tiled flooring, observing the digital billboards and palm trees

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking across the plaza ahead

entered.detail: overhead glass and metal canopy structure providing partial cover
tall building with reflective glass exterior and large digital displays
massive curved screen displaying advertisements on building facade
tropical palm trees planted in the plaza providing sparse vegetation
reflective white square tiles covering the plaza ground surface

segments.scene_description: Walking through a semi-covered futuristic plaza with white tiled flooring and scattered palm trees. Digital billboards cover the modern glass buildings on the left while a few pedestrians stroll through the sparse crowd in the sheltered environment.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza with full sky visibility
passes a standing NPC and continues along the elevated walkway ramp

agents.ego_description: moving along an elevated walkway toward a large cylindrical advertisement structure, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: NPC in brown jacket and cap standing still and looking around near the railing

entered.detail: tall rotating cylindrical structure with multiple digital advertisement screens
older brick building with modern additions, distinct from surrounding glass towers
metal safety railing along the edge of the raised pedestrian walkway
elevated transit track running above the plaza area

segments.scene_description: Moving along an elevated walkway toward a large cylindrical advertisement tower. A red brick building appears on the left as the covered structure exits view, and the plaza opens up to the overcast sky while the camera passes a standing NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending ramp toward busy street intersection

events.description: descends from elevated walkway to street level, ground surface changes to wet asphalt
approaches crosswalk with futuristic vehicles visible on the road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down a ramp toward street level, approaching a busy intersection with moving traffic

entered.detail: dark wet pavement reflecting the overcast sky and neon signs
yellow zebra crossing lines marking the pedestrian crossing area
tall skyscraper with glass facade and corporate signage including DELAMAIN
curved concrete overpass structure for vehicle traffic
corporate logo and branding on the right side building facade

segments.scene_description: Descending a ramp to street level where the ground becomes wet asphalt with visible reflections. The cylindrical billboard rotates prominently on the left as the camera approaches a busy intersection with elevated highways and modern glass towers.

events.description: futuristic cars drive through the intersection as ego crosses the street
finishes crossing the street and steps onto the sidewalk among pedestrians with umbrellas

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet intersection while futuristic vehicles drive past, then moving onto the crowded sidewalk

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection crosswalk
pedestrian carrying a blue umbrella walking on the sidewalk

entered.detail: ground level shops with large glass windows and entrance doors
futuristic cars parked along the side of the street
concrete seating benches along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wet intersection as futuristic vehicles drive past through the crosswalk. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk along the sidewalks near commercial storefronts, and the cylindrical billboard fades behind as the camera moves through the dense urban environment with parked cars and street furniture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered, modern plaza into the rainy, bustling heart of a cyberpunk intersection. It begins by gliding across white tiled flooring beneath a semi-covered structure, passing palm trees and digital billboards that line the glass buildings. As the camera moves along an elevated walkway, the shelter gives way to an overcast sky and a red brick facade before approaching a massive cylindrical advertisement tower. The scene then shifts as the camera descends a ramp toward the street level, where the bright tiles transition into wet, reflective asphalt beneath towering highways and glass skyscrapers. Finally, the movement carries the viewer across a busy intersection filled with futuristic vehicles and pedestrians with umbrellas, moving past commercial storefronts and parked cars into the dense urban haze.
